title: eupatorium squalidum var. subvelutinum
intro: Eupatorium squalidum var. subvelutinum, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of White Snakeroot include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some herbal remedies, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
